raw_description:
The 5-star Venue Jeddah Corniche hotel is placed in the heart of Jeddah overlooking the beautiful Red Sea Riviera waterfront. Located only at a 15-minute away from the world’s tallest fountain, King Fahd’s fountain. A shopping adventure lies within 5-minute away at the Red-Sea mall, 20 minutes away from UNESCO World Heritage site of Al-Balad on the historical downtown. Located within walking distance from a playful water park and just a short walk from the popular Roshn Front Swimming Beach.

Featuring a modern and luxurious décor, all generously-sized rooms are equipped with a flat screen TV offering satellite channel, coffee machine, safe and mini-bar. Most of guest rooms & suites enjoy panoramic views of the sea while others overlook the illuminated city of Jeddah. Private bathrooms come with a shower or Jacuzzi and offers free toiletries along with free Wi-Fi and a free basement parking.

The Venue offers all day business center, 3 dining outlets, 14 state-of-the-art meeting rooms, Jeddah’s only pillar-less wedding Hall Duniaty, beauty salon and a fitness club with 2 swimming pools.

At the Venue’s Le Voyageur, the main restaurant, an international cuisine is served as Breakfast, Lunch and Dinner buffets. Other dining options available at the Lobby, serving quick bites; and cocktails and casual food at Astro Lounge café, set at a magnificent view of the Red-Sea.
Guests can treat themselves at the spa and massage facilities with a pampering menu to relax and revitalize. It includes saunas, steam rooms and a Jacuzzi. There is also an outdoor swimming pool for men and an indoor pool for women.

Day trips, chauffeur driven car rentals and journeys to Makkah & Madinah, can be arranged at the concierge desk, also providing luggage storage available 24-hours, operated under our Chief Concierge, a Golden key holder and member of Les Clefs d'Or.

The hotel is conveniently located at just 15-minute drive from King Abdul-Aziz International Airport.

Couples particularly like the location — they rated it8.6for a two-person trip.

description: Experience clinical levels of high-end luxury at The Venue Jeddah Corniche. Located conveniently in its prime location, this property features 10 key amenities including 2 swimming pools, Free WiFi, Free parking.
